message:
feat(engine): add 210 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for:
- extension_lifecycle_manager (44 tests): state machine transitions,
  guards, error paths, serde, determinism
- feature_parity_tracker (46 tests): ES2020 feature areas, test262
  pass rates, lockstep results, waiver governance, serde
- frankenlab_extension_lifecycle (28 tests): lifecycle scenarios,
  startup/cancel/degraded modes, serde
- frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix (47 tests): gap tracking, coverage
  percentages, upstream vs local, serde
- golden_vectors (45 tests): hex encoding/decoding, vector sets,
  boundary conditions, immutability contract, serde

Also fix pre-existing compile error in franken_tail_latency_control_plane
binary (variable shadowing function name).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
